Your Privacy

This site uses tracking technologies. You may opt in or opt out of the use of these technologies.

Essential
On

Essential cookies and services are used to enable core website features, such as ensuring the security of the website.

* * *

Marketing
Off

Marketing cookies and services are used to deliver personalized advertisements, promotions, and offers. These technologies enable targeted advertising and marketing campaigns by collecting information about users' interests, preferences, and online activities.

* * *

Analytics
Off

Analytics cookies and services are used for collecting statistical information about how visitors interact with a website. These technologies provide insights into website usage, visitor behavior, and site performance to understand and improve the site and enhance user experience.

* * *

Functional
Off

Functional cookies and services are used to offer enhanced and personalized functionalities. These technologies provide additional features and improved user experiences, such as remembering your language preferences, font sizes, region selections, and customized layouts. Opting out of these cookies may render certain services or functionality of the website unavailable.

SaveDenyAccept all

# Report Abuse On Vercel

Please use this form to report illegal or malicious activity involving sites deployed on Vercel.

Your full name

Your email address

Abuse type

Select abuse typePhishing or MalwareCopyright Infringement / DMCATrademark ViolationsOther

By clicking Submit Report, I acknowledge I have read Vercel's [Privacy Notice](https://vercel.com/legal/privacy-policy), and I confirm that I have a bona fide belief the information and allegations contained in this report are accurate and complete.

__llm_logo_reasoning.reasoning: Selected #0 because it is visible, located in the header, and matches the brand name 'Vercel' with a href to home, making it the primary brand logo.

primary.reasoning: Button #0 with text 'Sign Up' is likely the primary CTA due to its dark background color (#171717) and action-oriented text, which is typical for primary actions like signing up.

secondary.reasoning: Button #2 with text 'Submit Report' has a different background color (#F2F2F2) and serves a secondary function, making it a suitable secondary button.

rawLogoSelection.selectedLogoReasoning: Selected #0 because it is visible, located in the header, and matches the brand name 'Vercel' with a href to home, making it the primary brand logo.
